docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHIRITAKA, ASAKO AS TO DEFENDANT AOYAMA, TAKASHI NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-03-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-04-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-19-2002

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-19-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-03-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEC-10-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-19-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-10-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
